sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, values Tuple(num1 Int32, num2 Int32));
SELECT id, tupleIntDivOrZeroByNumber(values, 5) AS quotients FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET values = (25, 0) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, tupleIntDivOrZeroByNumber(values, 10) AS new_quotients FROM test_table;
